heading: Scrip, tokens, tickets
label: 608 Scrip, tokens, tickets
text: The Administrator of General Services, in the operation of motor vehicle pools or systems under this subchapter, may provide for the sale and use of scrip, tokens, tickets, and similar devices to collect payment.
